\"???: The act of choosing to be immorta: "???: The act of choosing to be immortal is inherently immoral because it defies the natural cycle of life and death.

\"???: I had looked into the cells of So: "???: I had looked into the cells of Solosis and learned that extracted cells can shapeshift themselves to their host.
